message:
🐛 Fix DPS mapping — verified against Tuya IoT Cloud API

DPS assignments were wrong. Corrected using cloud API dp_id→code mapping:
- DPS 7 is battery_percentage (not pH)
- DPS 10 is pH ÷100 (not ORP)
- DPS 12 is orp_value (not temperature)
- DPS 2 is temp_current ÷10 (not EC)
- DPS 11 is conductivity_value ÷1000 (mS/cm)
- Added DPS 113 (CF ÷10), 114 (humidity), 126 (salt_tds)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 name: "Water Quality Monitor"
 description: "Monitor Tuya-based water quality testers (TDS, pH, ORP, EC, temperature) via MQTT"
-version: "1.0.1"
+version: "1.1.0"
 init: false
 slug: "water-quality-monitor"
 url: "https://github.com/clubanderson/ha-water-quality-monitor"

@@ -22,54 +22,69 @@
 log = logging.getLogger("water_quality")
 
 # DPS mapping for Tuya water quality testers (e.g., YINMIK)
+# Verified against Tuya IoT Cloud API dp_id → code mapping
 SENSORS = {
-    "1": {
+    "1": {  # tds_in
         "name": "TDS",
         "unit": "ppm",
         "device_class": None,
         "icon": "mdi:water-opacity",
         "scale": 1,
     },
-    "2": {
-        "name": "EC",
-        "unit": "\u00b5S/cm",
-        "device_class": None,
-        "icon": "mdi:flash-outline",
+    "2": {  # temp_current
+        "name": "Temperature",
+        "unit": "\u00b0C",
+        "device_class": "temperature",
+        "icon": "mdi:thermometer-water",
+        "scale": 0.1,
+    },
+    "7": {  # battery_percentage
+        "name": "Battery",
+        "unit": "%",
+        "device_class": "battery",
+        "icon": "mdi:battery",
         "scale": 1,
     },
-    "7": {
+    "10": {  # ph
         "name": "pH",
         "unit": "pH",
         "device_class": None,
         "icon": "mdi:ph",
-        "scale": 1,
+        "scale": 0.01,
     },
-    "10": {
+    "11": {  # conductivity_value
+        "name": "EC",
+        "unit": "mS/cm",
+        "device_class": None,
+        "icon": "mdi:flash-outline",
+        "scale": 0.001,
+    },
+    "12": {  # orp_value
         "name": "ORP",
         "unit": "mV",
         "device_class": "voltage",
         "icon": "mdi:lightning-bolt",
         "scale": 1,
     },
-    "11": {
-        "name": "Conductivity",
-        "unit": "\u00b5S/cm",
+    "113": {  # eccf
+        "name": "CF",
+        "unit": "",
         "device_class": None,
         "icon": "mdi:flash-circle",
-        "scale": 1,
-    },
-    "12": {
-        "name": "Temperature",
-        "unit": "\u00b0C",
-        "device_class": "temperature",
-        "icon": "mdi:thermometer-water",
         "scale": 0.1,
     },
-    "115": {
-        "name": "Battery",
+    "114": {  # humidity
+        "name": "Humidity",
         "unit": "%",
-        "device_class": "battery",
-        "icon": "mdi:battery",
+        "device_class": "humidity",
+        "icon": "mdi:water-percent",
+        "scale": 1,
+    },
+    "126": {  # salt_tds
+        "name": "Salt",
+        "unit": "ppm",
+        "device_class": None,
+        "icon": "mdi:shaker-outline",
         "scale": 1,
     },
 }
